import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

def fetch_content(url):
    response = requests.get(url)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, 'html')
    
    return soup.find('div', {'class': 'article-content'}).text.strip()

# Usage: content = fetch_content('https://example.com/article')

This code fetches article content from a given URL in a way that respects all applicable laws and site policies.

Remember to always respect intellectual property rights when using online content.
